name: The Office Games
original_name: ร้อยเล่ม เกมส์ออฟฟิศ
overview: Alice, a woman who seem to be strong confident with sharp-mouth, must make money to support her family. Meanwhile, Mes, the former engineer who has designed a building which later had become collapsed. His life has been fallen since then. Alice and Mes have started their work for the bank. Two of them need to work under pressure from both national finance situation and their workmate who is ready to play a dirty trick for achievement.
